name: Democrats.org
subject: re: taking back the House
body:
Let's get to work. **We don't need any more Republicans in Congress who are going to be a rubber stamp for Trump's agenda. Pitch in today to help elect more Democrats to Congress.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce19/4067b0a/2f9436523/7e77b867/2656642132/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170514_dnc_nd&source=em_20170514_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170514_dnc_nd")**
[](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce19/4067b0a/2f9436523/7e77b864/2656642132/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20170514_dnc_nd&source=em_20170514_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170514_dnc_nd") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce19/4067b0a/2f9436523/7e77b865/2656642132/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em_20170514_dnc_nd&source=em_20170514_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170514_dnc_nd") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce19/4067b0a/2f9436523/7e77b862/2656642132/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=em_20170514_dnc_nd&source=em_20170514_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170514_dnc_nd") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce19/4067b0a/2f9436523/7e77b863/2656642132/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=em_20170514_dnc_nd&source=em_20170514_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170514_dnc_nd")

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce19/4067b0a/2f9436523/7e77b86b/2656642132/VEsHBg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170514_dnc_nd&source=em_20170514_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170514_dnc_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce19/4067b0a/2f9436523/7e77b869/2656642132/VEsHAA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170514_dnc_nd&source=em_20170514_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170514_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: on my mind this Mother's Day:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
This weekend, we celebrate our moms and the critical role they play in all we do and who we are. Yet this Mother's Day, the moms (and dads) I'm hearing from throughout Maryland are deeply worried about the future and about losing access to critical health care for themselves or their loved ones.

I miss my own mother every day, but I know she is with us in this fight. She passed away ten years ago, but because she had access to affordable health care, she successfully fought off breast cancer for over fifteen years. I know she would be marching with us to ensure that everyone can have access to lifesaving treatment.

Every day I hear from Marylanders whose lives will be threatened by passage of Trumpcare 2.0 -- or "Wealthcare," as I call it. While providing billions of dollars of tax breaks for insurance companies and the wealthiest, this bill presents a real and present danger to millions who rely on the Affordable Care Act. And that's only the beginning.

Marylanders with pre-existing conditions are at risk of losing their health coverage, and moms (and dads) who have children with severe illnesses who count on Medicaid for critical support or around-the-clock care don't know how they will be able to continue to care for their family members.

[**We cannot afford to turn our backs on the millions of our fellow Marylanders and Americans who will be severely harmed by this disastrous GOP plan. That 's why on this Mother's Day it seems fitting to recommit ourselves to fight tooth and nail to defeat Trumpcare 2.0 and everything it stands for. **](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91beb/70cdc2ba/4751dd99/397f153/289707097/VEsH/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/sign-join-the-fight-to-defeat-trumpcare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+We+cannot+afford+to+turn+our+backs+on+th&utm_campaign=em051417&source=em051417")

We began this opposition five months ago with the Women's March, and with each new challenge, we have shown that our grassroots action has had results. Congressional Republicans can't hide from the bitter truth about Trumpcare 2.0 because we will not let them.

_This Mother 's Day, let's make sure moms and families in Maryland and across our country won't have to decide whether they can afford to save their child's life or get treated for a critical illness._

[**Stand with me, share your story, and pledge to raise hell at this latest outrage. >> **](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91beb/70cdc2ba/4751dd99/397f150/289707097/VEsE/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/sign-join-the-fight-to-defeat-trumpcare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Stand+with+me+share+your+story+and+pledg&utm_campaign=em051417&source=em051417")

We must fight Trumpcare 2.0, and we must win -- because real lives depend on it.

Chris

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

[www.vanhollen.org/donate](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91beb/70cdc2ba/4751dd99/397f151/289707097/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vanhollen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+wwwvanhollenorgdonate&utm_campaign=em051417&source=em051417")

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91beb/70cdc2ba/4751dd99/397f16e/289707097/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em051417&source=em051417") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Team Kasich
subject: The latest
body:
Today is a special day. To all of the women with one of the
toughest and most important jobs out there, happy Mother's Day!

Peter, today is a special day.
To all of the women with one of the most important jobs out
there, Happy Mother's Day!

Upcoming Event:

CNN will host a Town Hall Debate
with Gov. Kasich and Sen. Bernie Sanders on Tuesday, May 16th at
9PM ET. Be sure to follow along on Twitter and help us get Gov.
Kasich's message out! Twitter.com/JohnKasich

Last week, in response to the
news about President Trump firing FBI Director James Comey, Gov.
Kasich issued the following statement:

Gov. Kasich was honored on
Saturday as a recipient of the National Ethnic Coalition of
Organizations' 2017 Ellis Island Medal of Honor. He joined
astronaut Buzz Aldrin, journalist Fareed Zakaria and others. Read
more here.

In case you missed the news about
our exclusive offer, we have some copies of Gov. Kasich's new
book, Two Paths: America Divided or United, and we'd like to send
you a copy as a thank you if you'll make a generous contribution
to help us spread his message.

>>Chip in $50 Now<<
Receive a copy of the book

>>Chip in $150 or More<<
Receive a signed copy of the book

The dollars we raise go directly
into helping tell not only the story about the work he's doing to
strengthen Ohio, but also provide a hopeful and more inclusive
path forward for our country.

In case you missed it, watch Gov.
John Kasich's recent interview on Fox Business Varney & Co.

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

You were added to the system July 18, 2015.

http://email.sermodigital.com/p/iWWq5td2hN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Russ Feingold, LegitAction
subject: Obstruction of justice now on the record
body:
Trump admitted he fired Comey to end the investigation into his ties to Russian election interference. | [](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c2/1c469400/23eae61/3549ac3/3538736309/VEsH/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/demand-a-special-prosecutor_LP?source=20170514_r4w_sp_dt_msg2_rs&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20170514_r4w_sp_dt_msg2_rs") Friend, The articles of impeachment that were being prepared against Richard Nixon before he resigned included obstruction of justice. Obstruction of justice was also the key charge in the impeachment of Bill Clinton. **On Thursday, the Trump Administration -- and even the president himself -- bragged that the firing of James Comey was intended to end the investigation into the Trump campaign 's ties to Russian intelligence operations in the 2016 U.S. election.** Does Trump's admission amount to impeachable obstruction of justice? We must have a special prosecutor leading an independent investigation to find out. [_**If you haven 't signed the LegitAction petition calling for a special prosecutor yet, please do it now. This situation is developing rapidly.**_](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c2/1c469400/23eae61/3549ac0/3538736309/VEsE/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/demand-a-special-prosecutor_LP?source=20170514_r4w_sp_dt_msg2_rs&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=2+-+If+you+havenrsquot+signed+the+LegitActio&utm_campaign=20170514_r4w_sp_dt_msg2_rs") On Thursday, Trump told NBC's Lester Holt that he fired James Comey in part because "this Russia thing with Trump and Russia is a made up story." Also on Thursday, Trump's spokesperson said, "We think that we've actually, by removing Director Comey, taken steps to [make the Russia story come to its conclusion]." Then, on Friday, Trump publicly threatened now-former FBI Director Comey with the prospect of releasing tapes of their conversations. This is one of the most serious crises in presidential legitimacy our nation has ever faced. We cannot trust the investigation into this matter to anyone else that Trump can fire. [_**Join the call for a special prosecutor today. Sign the LegitAction petition now.**_](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c2/1c469400/23eae61/3549ac1/3538736309/VEsF/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/demand-a-special-prosecutor_LP?source=20170514_r4w_sp_dt_msg2_rs&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=3+-+Join+the+call+for+a+special+prosecutor+t&utm_campaign=20170514_r4w_sp_dt_msg2_rs") There are so many questions about Trump's behavior and the legitimacy of the 2016 election that, in a sense, it's not surprising to see an illegitimately elected president behaving without legitimacy. But we can't lose sight of the bigger fight here. Thanks for standing up today, Russ Feingold | [SIGN ON](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c2/1c469400/23eae61/3549afe/3538736309/VEsC/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/demand-a-special-prosecutor_LP?source=20170514_r4w_sp_dt_msg2_rs&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=4+-+SIGN+ON&utm_campaign=20170514_r4w_sp_dt_msg2_rs")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c2/1c469400/23eae61/3549aff/3538736309/VEsD/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=5+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20170514_r4w_sp_dt_msg2_rs&source=20170514_r4w_sp_dt_msg2_rs"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c2/1c469400/23eae61/3549afc/3538736309/VEsA/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=6+-+Click+here+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=20170514_r4w_sp_dt_msg2_rs&source=20170514_r4w_sp_dt_msg2_rs"). | Authorized and paid for by LegitPAC

Obstruction of justice was also the key charge in the impeachment of Bill Clinton. On Thursday, the Trump Administration -- and even the president himself -- bragged that the firing of James Comey was intended to end the investigation into the Trump campaign 's ties to Russian intelligence operations in the 2016 U.S. election. Does Trump's admission amount to impeachable obstruction of justice? We must have a special prosecutor leading an independent investigation to find out. "" On Thursday, Trump told NBC's Lester Holt that he fired James Comey in part because "this Russia thing with Trump and Russia is a made up story." But we can't lose sight of the bigger fight here. Thanks for standing up today, Russ Feingold | ""

name: Team Maggie
subject: Your name is missing (action on healthcare)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd5b/2a380d31/154439f3/fef194/2064377180/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd5b/2a380d31/154439f3/fef194/2064377180/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello --
Earlier this month, House Republicans just pushed through a dangerous bill that could drive up costs for anyone with a pre-existing condition.
Under this plan if you're a woman, if you have asthma, if you have cancer, or if you're an older American, you could pay more for your care. Now, it's heading for the Senate.
There's a LOT on the line here, and you're our last line of defense to make sure this devastating plan doesn't become law.**It looks like you haven't added your name to urge Senate Republicans not to pass Trumpcare.[We really need your voice, so please sign now.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd5b/2a380d31/154439f3/fef195/2064377180/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170504_healthcare-house?source=e20170514_healthcare3rs_ns&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
**EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**SIGNED TO PROTECT HEALTHCARE:** **[PENDING](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd5b/2a380d31/154439f3/fef195/2064377180/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170504_healthcare-house?source=e20170514_healthcare3rs_ns&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**

clean_body: "" "" Hello -- Earlier this month, House Republicans just pushed through a dangerous bill that could drive up costs for anyone with a pre-existing condition. Under this plan if you're a woman, if you have asthma, if you have cancer, or if you're an older American, you could pay more for your care. Now, it's heading for the Senate. There's a LOT on the line here, and you're our last line of defense to make sure this devastating plan doesn't become law.It looks like you haven't added your name to urge Senate Republicans not to pass Trumpcare. "" EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com SIGNED TO PROTECT HEALTHCARE: "" "" We ALL likely know someone who will be hurt by this plan. This bill could destroy the lives of millions, all so Donald Trump's wealthiest backers and corporate special interests can get a tax break. It's time to fight back, everyone, and we need you with us more than ever. "" Thanks for taking action, Team Maggie ""
